evals.prompt: Is Fazier worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does it compare to other directories?
evals.expected_output: Explains Fazier offers a DR81 dofollow backlink, one of the highest from any startup directory. Notes the free tier requires adding a badge to your site and has a 15-day review period. Compares with Uneed (DR74, no badge), Open Launch (DR65), and notes only Product Hunt (DR91) and Hacker News (DR91) significantly exceed it.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States Fazier has a DR81 dofollow backlink, one of the highest from startup directories

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares with at least one other directory like Uneed (DR74) or Open Launch (DR65) to show relative value

assertions.name: free_tier_tradeoffs
assertions.description: Notes the free tier involves a trade-off such as a badge requirement or review wait period, unlike some other directories that offer instant free listings

evals.prompt: Should I pay $39 for Fazier Premium or just use the free tier?
evals.expected_output: Explains Premium guarantees a DR81+ dofollow backlink, removes the badge requirement, publishes instantly, and includes 15-day promotion. Free tier also provides a backlink but requires adding a badge to your site and waiting up to 15 days. Recommends Premium if backlink certainty and speed matter, free if patient and willing to add the badge.

assertions.name: premium_benefits
assertions.description: Describes Premium tier benefits including a guaranteed backlink and faster publishing compared to the free tier

assertions.name: free_requirements
assertions.description: Mentions the free tier requires some form of badge or verification on your site and involves a review wait

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides a recommendation based on the user's priorities such as budget, timing, or willingness to add a badge

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to Fazier and what should I prepare?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission: create account at fazier.com, prepare materials (name, description, screenshots, working URL), submit via /submit, choose tier (free with badge, or paid for instant), wait for manual review if free tier, engage with community after listing.

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes creating an account and submitting with product details like name, description, and screenshots

assertions.name: tier_choice
assertions.description: Mentions the choice between free and paid tiers as part of the submission process

assertions.name: review_process
assertions.description: Notes that submissions go through manual moderation or review before being published
